name: Tap In Golf Lounge
address: 2707 Dartmouth College Hwy, North Haverhill, NH 03774
about: Tap In Golf Lounge is a golf simulation venue in North Haverhill, NH, offering hourly bay rentals on advanced simulators. The facility operates daily from 4:00 AM to 11:00 PM and provides a welcoming atmosphere for players of all skill levels, from beginners to scratch golfers. Pricing is structured per hour, with rates of $40 on weekdays and $50 on weekends, and a $20 per month membership offering a $10 discount per booking. The venue also hosts winter leagues, provides first access to events for members, and features a BYOB policy.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced ball-tracking and swing-analysis technology for realistic gameplay
Ability to play world-renowned golf courses without leaving North Haverhill
Flexible membership options with savings and early access to leagues and events
Welcoming atmosphere with ample space to relax between swings

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beer) policy is allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulators with ball-tracking and swing-analysis technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, customers are required to bring their own clubs. The venue provides golf balls and tees.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beer) policy, allowing customers to bring their own alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify a time for playing 18 holes, as sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for all skill levels, including beginners, and offers a welcoming atmosphere for families.
